name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: DLL Execution via Rasautou
notes:
This Building Block detects using Rasautou.exe for loading arbitrary .DLL specified in -d option and executes the export specified in -p.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Julia Fomina, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: DLL Execution via Rasautou.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects using Rasautou.exe for loading arbitrary .DLL specified in -d option and executes the export specified in -p.

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: DLL Execution via Rasautou on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of rasdlui.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -d %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -p %' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: DLL Execution via Rasautou on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of rasdlui.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -d %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -p %' AQL filter query
